# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience premium live TV streaming services with Sounddrop. Discover artists, create playlists, support musicians directly, and enjoy radio streaming with subtitles.

### Discover
https://example.com/discover
Deep-dive into artist backgrounds with Wikipedia integration and comprehensive search. Find your next favorite musician on our NFL streaming service quality platform.

### Monetization
https://example.com/monetization
Monetize your listening experience like NFL Sunday ticket streaming. Use Cash App, tip jars, and flexible payment options to directly support your favorite artists.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Questions about live TV streaming services or artist features? Contact Sounddrop&#39;s support team for assistance with playlists, payments, and accessibility options.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
